commands: CONTAINER=$(docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -iE 'backend|frappe' | head -1); echo "Container: $CONTAINER"; docker exec $CONTAINER bash -c "cd /home/frappe/frappe-bench && bench --site karavanimports.com set-config host_name https://www.karavanimports.com && bench --site karavanimports.com clear-cache && echo DONE"
